name: validator-selection-attestation
payload_encoding: abi.encodePacked(bytes32 canonicalHash, bytes32 policyHash, bytes32 universeHash)

fields.name: canonical_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 over the selected validator set using the canonical field order defined by the Rust/Go/Solidity implementations.

fields.name: policy_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 over the selection policy weights and thresholds.

fields.name: universe_hash
fields.description: SHA-256 over the sorted eligible validator address universe with null separators.
